## Law Mercenaries

#### 0-1 Arbites Enforcer (Cost: 3 Glory)

A Palanite Enforcers or Inquisition (Ordo: Minoris) Warband cannot take this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Arbites Enforce | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | \-2 | 25-32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Arbites Enforcer is equipped with Standard Armour, a Shield, an Automatic Shotgun, a Shock Stave, and Magnacles. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Automatic Shotgun.** 12”, \+1 DICE, SHOTGUN, Bayonet Lug, Shield Combo, ASSAULT  
* **Shock Stave.** Melee, BLOCK, STUN, TWO-HANDED, Shield Combo  
* **Magnacles.** Enemy models in close combat with this model cannot stand up from being Down.

**Abilities**

* **Ruthless Efficiency.** The Arbites Enforcer does not roll to randomly select a target when making ranged attacks against enemies that are engaged in close combat, instead always targeting the chosen target.

**Keywords**  
—

#### 0-1 Hardcase Cyber Mastiff (Cost: 3 Glory)

A Necromunda Gang (House Orlock or Palanite Enforcers) or Inquisition (Ordo: Minoris) Warband cannot take this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Hardcase Cyber Mastiff | 6”/Infantry | N/A | \+1 | \-2 | 25-28mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Hardcase Cyber Mastiff is equipped with its Savage Bite, included in its cost. It cannot be equipped with any other weapons, armour, or equipment.

* **Savage Bite.** Melee, ARMOUR PIERCING 1

**Abilities**

* **Cyber Swiftness.** The Hardcase Cyber Mastiff has \+1 DICE to all Dash and Jump Success Rolls  
* **Loyal Protector.** Enemies in melee with the Hardcase Cyber Mastiff cannot attack its owner.  
* **Pet.** Select one GANGER model in your Warband at the start of the battle. The Hardcase Cyber Mastiff forms a FIRETEAM with that model. That model is its owner.  
* **Watchdog.** If the Hardcase Cyber Mastiff and its owner are both legal targets for an enemy’s Charge action, the enemy cannot choose the owner.

**Keywords**  
ARTIFICIAL, NO PROMOTION

#### 0-1 Sister of Silence (Cost: 4 Glory)

Cannot be taken by an Adeptus Custodes, Adeptus Mechanicus, Necromunda Gang (House Dalaque), or Ironhead Squat Prospectors Warband, nor by any Warband led by a PSYKER model.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Sister of Silence | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | \-2 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Sister of Silence is equipped with Power Armour, an Executioner Greatblade, and a Stakethrower. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Executioner Greatblade.** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE, another \+1 INJURY DICE against targets with DAEMON or PSYKER Keyword, TWO-HANDED  
* **Stakethrower.** 18”, \+1 INJURY DICE against targets with DAEMON or PSYKER Keyword, IGNORE ARMOUR on Critical Hit, CRITICAL, Scope, Shield Combo

**Abilities**

* **Daughter of the Abyss.** Injury rolls with the PSYCHIC or IGNORE ARMOUR Keyword have \-1 INJURY DICE against the Sister of Silence.  
* **Deft Parry.** Melee attacks made against the Sister of Silence have \-1 DICE to Hit.

**Keywords**  
ANATHEMA, FEAR
